zh.Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hainaut, Belgique: 比利時海瑙特貝爾希利艾-利阿巴易
zh.Cambron-Casteau, Hainaut, Belgium: 比利時海瑙特坎布洛-卡斯奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean III de Barbençon於1316年出生在比利時海瑙特坎布洛-卡斯奧時，他的父親Jean II Guillaume Barbançon34歲，母親Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies26歲。他於1360年之前與Jeanne VON GUINES在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1378年9月4日在比利時海瑙特貝爾希利艾-利阿巴易享年62歲。

zh-hans.Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hainaut, Belgique: 比利时海瑙特貝爾希利艾-利阿巴易
zh-hans.Cambron-Casteau, Hainaut, Belgium: 比利时海瑙特坎布洛-卡斯奧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean III de Barbençon于1316年出生在比利时海瑙特坎布洛-卡斯奧时，他的父亲Jean II Guillaume Barbançon34岁，母亲Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies26岁。他于1360年之前与Jeanne VON GUINES在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1378年9月4日在比利时海瑙特貝爾希利艾-利阿巴易享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean III de Barbençon was born in 1316, in Cambron-Casteau, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Jean II Guillaume Barbançon, was 34 and his mother, Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies, was 26. He married Jeanne VON GUINES before 1360, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 4 September 1378, in Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hainaut, Belgium, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean III de Barbençon est né en 1316, à Cambron-Casteau, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Jean II Guillaume Barbançon, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne VON GUINES avant 1360, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1378, à Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hainaut, Belgique, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean III de Barbençon 1316 in Cambron-Casteau, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean II Guillaume Barbançon 34 und seine Mutter Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies 26. Er hat vor 1360 in Frankreich Jeanne VON GUINES geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. September 1378 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hennegau, Belgien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean III de Barbençon è nato il nel 1316 nel Cambron-Casteau, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Jean II Guillaume Barbançon, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne VON GUINES prima del 1360, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 4 settembre 1378, nel Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hainaut, Belgio, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hainaut, Belgique: ベルギーヘイナトバーシリース-ル'アッバイ
ja.Cambron-Casteau, Hainaut, Belgium: ベルギーヘイナトカンブロン-カステアウ
ja.lifeSummary: Jean III de Barbençonが1316年にベルギーヘイナトカンブロン-カステアウで生まれた時，父Jean II Guillaume Barbançonは34歳，母Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargiesは26歳であった。1360年以前にフランスでJeanne VON GUINESと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1378年9月4日にベルギーヘイナトバーシリース-ル'アッバイで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean III de Barbençon(이)가 1316년 벨기에 하인오트 캄브론-카스테오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean II Guillaume Barbançon(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1360년 이전 프랑스에서 Jeanne VON GUINES(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1378년 9월 4일 벨기에 하인오트 버시리스-'압베이에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean III de Barbençon nasceu em 1316, em Cambron-Casteau, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Jean II Guillaume Barbançon, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne VON GUINES antes 1360, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1378, em Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hainaut, Bélgica, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean III de Barbençon родился в 1316 г. в местности камброн-касто, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Jean II Guillaume Barbançon было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne VON GUINES перед 1360 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 4 сентября 1378 г. в местности бирсиллиес-л'аббеи, ханаут, Бельгия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean III de Barbençon nació en 1316, en Cambron-Casteau, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Jean II Guillaume Barbançon, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Eustachie alias Isabeau de Dargies, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Jeanne VON GUINES antes de 1360, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1378, en Bersillies-l'Abbaye, Hainaut, Bélgica, a la edad de 62 años.
